title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Tata Memorial Centre

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Tata Memorial Centre
jsonLd.description:
Tata Memorial Centre, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Varanasi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Tata Memorial Centre:
Tata Memorial Centre is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Memorial Centre!
